scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && mkdir dist/data && cp ../coffee.chealt.com/data/*.json dist/data && cp -r package.json dist && cp ../../yarn.lock dist && cp .yarnrc-lambda.yml dist/.yarnrc.yml && cp -r src dist && cd dist && yarn workspaces focus && rm -rf .yarn && rm -rf yarn.lock && rm -rf .yarnrc.yml && zip -rq package.zip .
